query:
SELECT actionTier, COUNT(*) as cnt FROM projects WHERE productLane = 'pumps' AND lifecycleStatus = 'active' GROUP BY actionTier ORDER BY cnt DESC;
SELECT stageCode, COUNT(*) as cnt FROM projects WHERE productLane = 'pumps' AND lifecycleStatus = 'active' GROUP BY stageCode ORDER BY cnt DESC LIMIT 10;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user HWMKhVWm4R1gayY.38561a93bc5c --database 3SMu786VMCWdCnmNSx6pxw --execute SELECT actionTier, COUNT(*) as cnt FROM projects WHERE productLane = 'pumps' AND lifecycleStatus = 'active' GROUP BY actionTier ORDER BY cnt DESC;
SELECT stageCode, COUNT(*) as cnt FROM projects WHERE productLane = 'pumps' AND lifecycleStatus = 'active' GROUP BY stageCode ORDER BY cnt DESC LIMIT 10;
